description: Check out my other uploads: https://archive.org/details/@skegox World War Two Historical Review Here are many revisionist works available for study and other useful material. If you are interested in real history , a critical approach to the past and not a one sided political view, this content will be of great value. These works are very precious as you can barely find this kind of content outside the internet, thanks to the censorship.  Good Reading Check bellow the National Socialist Colletion of Sources, there you will find a lot of primary sources and documents about Germany and the NSDAP ideology.  https://archive.org/details/NationalSocialistCollectionOfSources https://archive.org/details/ContemporaryHistory Learn the Truth Some websites where you can find more sources and information: http://www.vho.org/ http://www.ihr.org/ http://www.revisionist.net/ https://www.revisionisthistory.org/ http://revisionists.com/ http://inconvenienthistory.com/ https://www.impartialtruth.com http://codoh.com/ http://holocausthandbooks.com/ https://armreg.co.uk/ https://www.wintersonnenwende.com/scriptorium/english/welcome.html http://barnesreview.org/ http://nseuropa.blogspot.com/ http://nseuropa.org/ https://www.islam-radio.net/ http://www.der-stuermer.org/ http://www.jewwatch.com/ http://library.flawlesslogic.com/ https://third-reich-books.com/ http://galleria.thule-italia.com/ Invest your time! Do your own serious research! Break the chains
